title: lastila hirsuta
intro_study: According to "Biomedicine & pharmacotherapy = Biomedecine & pharmacotherapie", lastila hirsuta, also known as Mansoa hirsuta, has anti-inflammatory and analgesic potential without causing acute or subchronic toxic effects.
side_effects: Lastila hirsuta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive use of Lastila hirsuta may cause cardiovascular problems, including irregular heartbeat and increased blood pressure. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can also interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse reactions and reduced effectiveness of the medication.
